# phare_integrations (Data Source)

Fetches a list of integrations for a specific app.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "phare_integrations" "all" {
  app = "email"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The app key to filter integrations. Valid values: sms, discord, email, ilert, ntfy, outgoing_webhook, pushover, slack, telegram

### Read-Only

- `integrations` (Attributes List) List of integrations for the specified app (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--integrations))

<a id="nestedatt--integrations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `integrations`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp
- `id` (Number) Integration ID
- `name` (String) Integration name
- `paused` (Boolean) Whether the integration is paused
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp
